task_summary: SP22a attempted the first themed resident terminal surface, but stopped before product edits landed after a verifier rollback and model timeout.
notes: Mew over-read before the first edit. After operator steering, it proposed a source/test theme patch, but auto verification failed and the batch rolled back. It then read the failing test area but hit model_error/request timed out before producing a repair patch. The worktree was clean afterward; no Codex product-code rescue edits were made. Issue #21 records this implementation-lane recovery problem. Product work continued with smaller task #30/session #59.
